hypothesis: If a closed-loop Bayesian optimization platform autonomously explores the multidimensional parameter space of reactive carbon electrolyzers (bicarbonate concentration, temperature, flow rate, KOH concentration, and applied current density), then it will identify operating conditions that achieve higher CO2 reduction reactor yields more efficiently than conventional manual experimentation, because Gaussian process regression can model complex, nonlinear interactions among electrochemical parameters and direct sampling toward high-performing regions with fewer total experiments.
